Read Engine AXI Monitor Enable

Absolute Address:
Base Offset:
0x260
Size:
0x4
Source:
stream_regs.rdl

Description

Read engine AXI master monitor enable controls

Contents

Bits Identifier Access Reset Decoded Name
[31:5] RSVD r 0x0 -
[4] PERF_EN rw 0x0 -
[3] TIMEOUT_EN rw 0x1 -
[2] COMPL_EN rw 0x0 -
[1] ERR_EN rw 0x1 -
[0] MON_EN rw 0x1 -

Field Descriptions

RSVD

Reserved

PERF_EN

Performance enable - enable performance packets

TIMEOUT_EN

Timeout enable - enable timeout detection

COMPL_EN

Completion enable - enable completion packets

ERR_EN

Error enable - enable error detection

MON_EN

Monitor enable - master enable for read monitor
